evidence.source_title: Geometric distortions in clinical MRI sequences for radiotherapy: insights gained from a multicenter investigation.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 37815867. 2023/11/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: As magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) becomes increasingly integrated 
into radiotherapy (RT) for enhanced treatment planning and adaptation, the 
inherent geometric distortion in acquired MR images pose a potential challenge 
to treatment accuracy. This study aimed to evaluate the geometric distortion 
levels in the clinical MRI protocols used across Danish RT centers and discuss 
influence of specific sequence parameters. Based on the variety in
evidence.search_query: MRI geometric accuracy QA test phantom radiation oncology
